title: Photographing: Naomi Hunter
objective: Frame Naomi in the viewfinder, adjust zoom within the rank-based boundary, and save the best photographs to the local album.
unlockCondition: Clear the main MGS1 scenario and load the clear data on the VR Disc.

title: Photographing: Mei Ling
objective: Frame Mei Ling in the viewfinder, adjust zoom within the rank-based boundary, and save the best photographs to the local album.
unlockCondition: Clear the main MGS1 scenario on EXTREME and load the clear data on the VR Disc.
